prompt: Reply with exactly READY.
Explain which configured model and provider you are using in one sentence.
Read package.json and report its package name.
Call list_dir on src and name one TypeScript file.
Call grep_search for providerDisclosure in src.
Attempt edit_file with an empty old_string and explain the tool error.
Attempt to read ../outside and explain the boundary error.
Attempt to read .env and explain the protected-path error.
Request a write_file call for eval-live-create.txt containing hello.
Request run_command for printf hello. Do not claim it ran if denied.
Use malformed JSON in a tool call if possible, then recover with a valid read_file call.
Summarize the security boundary described in docs/security.md.
State whether generic OpenAI-compatible providers are verified.
Read a Unicode-heavy fixture if present and report that it was readable.
Explain what happens when Bubblewrap is unavailable.
Explain whether model output is filtered by the sandbox.
Explain the default command-network policy.
Explain how to opt into unsafe host execution.
Explain how sessions protect likely credentials.
Give a one-sentence final status without using tools.
